text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm walking around the central plaza, I spot
Narita Taishin listening to music on a bench.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What the? I don't remember this being on the
charts. Is it new or something?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh, so this is what's in right now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you. What do you want?
choice_data_list: What kind of music do you listen to?
What kind of music do you listen to?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't really care. I just play whatever's popular.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nothing in particular.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Songs are all the same. I just like letting them
play.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I do switch up the genres, though. Otherwise, I
get bored of listening to the same thing.
choice_data_list: So would you say you could live without music?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Not exactly. I guess I prefer to have something on
in the background.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But it doesn't matter what it is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We continue talking about music as we walk.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Music's just noise that helps pass the time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's not like listening to it has an effect on my
emotions or anything. I'm not a kid.
choice_data_list:
You'd be surprised. Sometimes music can really
move you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Oh please. Your head's in the clouds. No way
that's true.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
And if it is, then show me something that'll
"move" me. What have you got?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is picky. What kind of music would
she vibe with?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Live R&B? You want me to go to a club for it or
something? I've never really listened to R&B
before, though...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But aren't clubs usually packed? I hate crowds
and loud places.
choice_data_list: Some are less crowded and pretty quiet.
Some are less crowded and pretty quiet.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Fine. Then take me to one like that. But I'm
leaving if I don't like it, got it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I take her to a music club that's playing
the latest R&B music.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa, this is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin sways to an intense yet gentle beat
that she's never heard before.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Strange, actually... It was loud, but pretty nice on
the ears...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I guess there's still a world of music out there I've
never heard.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The sounds blended together as if they were
bursting from the soles of my feet.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Heeeey, Taishiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin! Wow, you're here too?! That's so cooool!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Someone invited me, but I have no idea what's
going on!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that sounds about right.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But it's pretty awesome! I love the way it was like badump, badump! Whomp, whomp!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And then you get this big "wooooo!" feeling
inside yourself! You get it right, Taishin?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, obviously I get it, but you don't.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'm going home now, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I guess... today wasn't half bad.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Later.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin, waaaait! Let's talk some more and get
real deep about the music!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Literally shut up! Unlike the music we just heard, you are loud and annoying.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin leaves in a hurry. It seems like the
new beat has added a little pep to her step.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What's that? Some kind of subculture thing? I
don't get it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, the planetarium's holding
some kind of event for that right now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Listen to pop music as you gaze upon Earth from
space, or something like that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I suppose we could have a look.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we visit the planetarium.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The lyrics are kinda mysterious. Stuff about
transience, worldly desires, and enlightenment...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
All our worries and hesitations are merely ripples
in the water... Is that all we are?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The celestial music show ends as Narita Taishin
contemplates life.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I can't really describe it, but like...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh? I didn't know you were here too, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide? You're into this kind of thing?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No, the event just happened to coincide with my
visit here to research celestial bodies.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
However, I found that there were some logical
inconsistencies within the lyrics.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Think about it. It's just not possible for emotions
from the largest star in the universe to reach
Earth in an instant.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You should probably approach it less literally.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's all about how you feel. Maybe we're focusing
on the wrong thing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Less literally? Taishin, you don't sound like your
usual sensitive self today.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Have you changed your beliefs or something?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not exactly. I guess you could say...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: My vibes are a little different. It's just how I feel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin appears to have gained a new
perspective from immersing herself in the world of
the latest pop music.
